name: Scales
description: Dual-channel note quantizer and SH-101-style step sequencer. Two independent quantized outputs, 35 scale slots across 5 banks, per-output shift modes (PRE/POST/DIATONIC), learn-mode scale capture, DUAL quantizer or 128-step sequencer modes.

controls.name: Multifunction buttons (12)
controls.description: 12 vertical buttons arranged as a one-octave keyboard (5 black + 7 white). Function depends on active mode: scale edit, root select, interval set, bank/slot select, or config options.
controls.detail: Green = active · red = OUT A quantize target · yellow = OUT B · colour blends by shift settings

controls.name: LEARN
controls.description: Short-press retains active scale and adds played notes. Long-press (>1s) clears the scale first. Exit by pressing again.
controls.detail: Blue when active · In SEQ: octave down (-)

controls.name: CONFIG
controls.description: Enters CONFIG mode — selects SHIFT behaviour, per-output shift enable, A→TRIG / B→TRIG triggers, and OUT B mode (CHROM / DIATONIC / DUAL / SEQ).
controls.detail: Blue when active · In SEQ: octave up (+)

controls.name: ROOT
controls.description: Enter Root mode. Short-press note button transposes the scale pattern to that root; long-press sets root without transposing (changes mode).
controls.detail: Blue when active · In SEQ: insert rest

controls.name: INTRVL
controls.description: Enter Interval mode. Sets OUT B's offset relative to OUT A in semitones (CHROM) or scale degrees (DIATONIC). Long-press = Tuning mode (0V + gate).
controls.detail: Blue when active · In SEQ: tie to previous note

controls.name: SAVE
controls.description: Save active scale to one of 35 slots (5 banks × 7 slots). Long-press = save sequence.
controls.detail: Lit red · black key selects bank · white key selects slot

controls.name: LOAD
controls.description: Load scale from memory. Long-press = load sequence / toggle SEQ record on-off.

controls.name: SHIFT MODE select (PRE/DIATONIC/POST/OUT A/OUT B/ROOT/SCALE)
controls.description: Seven shift-mode options for how SHIFT jack affects output. See Behaviors for each mode's logic.
controls.detail: Blue-label buttons · SHIFT jack drives the shift

controls.name: A→TRIG / B→TRIG
controls.description: When enabled, TRIG OUT pulses whenever OUT A (or OUT B) changes pitch. When both disabled, TRIG IN passes through to TRIG OUT.

controls.name: CHROMATIC / DIATONIC / DUAL|SEQ
controls.description: Configures OUT B mode: chromatic interval, diatonic interval, DUAL quantizer, or SEQ sequencer. See Behaviors.
controls.detail: Grey-label buttons · DUAL|SEQ button: solid red=DUAL, flashing=SEQ

controls.name: Trigger LED
controls.description: Lights whenever TRIG OUT emits a trigger or gate.

inputs.name: PITCH
inputs.description: Voltage to quantize. Range ±10V quantizes to active scale notes over 20 octaves.

inputs.name: TRIG
inputs.description: Trigger/gate input. With no patch, Scales quantizes continuously. When patched, Scales samples PITCH only on rising edge. In SEQ mode, acts as clock in.

inputs.name: SHIFT
inputs.description: Shift modulation input (±10V). Usage depends on SHIFT MODE: pre-sum, diatonic, post-sum, root select, or scale select. In DUAL = second pitch input for OUT B. In SEQ = reset trigger.

outputs.name: OUT A
outputs.description: Quantized pitch output for PITCH input (1V/oct)

outputs.name: OUT B
outputs.description: Second quantized output — mode determined by CONFIG: chromatic/diatonic interval of OUT A, independent DUAL quantizer, or SEQ sequencer output

outputs.name: TRIG
outputs.description: Trigger/gate output. Pass-through of TRIG IN, or A/B change detector, or SEQ clock pass.

behaviors.name: Trigger vs untriggered quantization
behaviors.description: Unpatched: Scales continuously samples and outputs new quantized pitches whenever the input crosses a threshold. Patched: output only updates on TRIG rising edge — lets you time quantization to external rhythm.

behaviors.name: SHIFT MODE: PRE
behaviors.description: SHIFT voltage is summed with PITCH (both chromatically pre-quantized), then the sum is quantized to the active scale. Shifted output always conforms to the scale.

behaviors.name: SHIFT MODE: DIATONIC
behaviors.description: SHIFT is interpreted as scale degrees, not semitones. A +3 shift moves the quantized note up 3 scale degrees — preserves diatonic transposition regardless of scale interval pattern.

behaviors.name: SHIFT MODE: POST
behaviors.description: PITCH is quantized first, then SHIFT is added after quantization. Output can land on any chromatic note — allows detuning shifted output off the scale.

behaviors.name: DUAL quantizer mode
behaviors.description: Module splits into two quantizers. PITCH → OUT A, SHIFT → OUT B. Both conform to the same active scale. Ideal for polyphonic quantization with one instance.

behaviors.name: SEQ mode (SH-101 style)
behaviors.description: OUT B becomes a 128-step sequencer. TRIG IN = clock · SHIFT = reset. RECORD (LOAD) + multifunction buttons step-enter notes, rests and ties. 35 sequence slots saveable.

behaviors.name: INTRVL mode
behaviors.description: Sets OUT B's interval relative to OUT A. Press a multifunction note once = positive interval (green), twice = negative (red). CHROMATIC config = semitones, DIATONIC = scale degrees.

behaviors.name: LEARN scale capture
behaviors.description: Plays notes from external keyboard into PITCH (with TRIG gate) — Scales adds each played note to the active scale. Long-press LEARN first clears scale, so played notes define it entirely.

behaviors.name: Root vs transpose
behaviors.description: Short-press a note = transpose the scale pattern to that new root (intervals preserved). Long-press = change root without transposing (same notes, new tonal centre).

behaviors.name: Trigger delay
behaviors.description: Scales has a programmable incoming trigger delay to compensate for sluggish pitch-source stabilization. Multifunction LEDs indicate delay time — prevents false quantization readings.

behaviors.name: Sequence transpose via ROOT
behaviors.description: While a sequence plays, Root-mode note-press transposes the playback by that amount (relative to C). Immediate live transposition of the running sequence.

patchIdeas.name: LFO to arpeggio
patchIdeas.patch: Slow triangle LFO → PITCH · clock → TRIG · active scale = minor pentatonic · clock samples LFO into steps along the scale · one LFO becomes a melodic arpeggio that follows the LFO shape
patchIdeas.diagram:
Scales:
* Scale: minor pentatonic

LFO:

Clock:

VCO:

ENV:

- LFO (Out) >> Scales (PITCH)
- Clock (Out) t> Scales (In TRIG)
- Scales (OUT A) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Scales (Out TRIG) g> ENV (Gate)

patchIdeas.name: Two-voice harmony
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer pitch → PITCH · INTRVL DIATONIC + 2 · OUT A drives VCO 1 (melody) · OUT B drives VCO 2 (third above) · instant two-voice harmony that follows scale contour · no matter the scale, intervals stay diatonic
patchIdeas.diagram:
Scales:
* Scale: major · INTRVL DIATONIC +2

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Scales (PITCH)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Scales (In TRIG)
- Scales (OUT A) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Scales (OUT B) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> ENV (Gate)

patchIdeas.name: Dual quantizer polyphony
patchIdeas.patch: CONFIG · DUAL mode · PITCH = voice 1 pitch source · SHIFT = voice 2 pitch source · both quantize to shared scale · OUT A + OUT B feed two VCOs · shared scale change affects both voices
patchIdeas.diagram:
Scales:
* OUT B: DUAL
* Scale: dorian

Sequencer 1:

Sequencer 2:

- Sequencer 1 (Out) >> Scales (PITCH)
- Sequencer 2 (Out) >> Scales (SHIFT)
- Scales (OUT A) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Scales (OUT B) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Turing Machine tamed
patchIdeas.patch: Turing Machine CV → PITCH · Turing clock → TRIG · scale = user-defined (e.g., C blues) · random voltages turn into generative melody constrained to the blues scale · slowly morph scale notes on/off during performance
patchIdeas.diagram:
Scales:
* Scale: C blues (user)

Turing Machine:

Clock:

VCO:

ENV:

- Turing Machine (CV Out) >> Scales (PITCH)
- Clock (Out) t> Turing Machine (Clock)
- Clock (Out) t> Scales (In TRIG)
- Scales (OUT A) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Scales (Out TRIG) g> ENV (Gate)

patchIdeas.name: Diatonic transpose via LFO
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer pitch → PITCH · CONFIG · SHIFT MODE = DIATONIC · slow LFO → SHIFT · OUT A stays in scale but modulates up/down by whole scale degrees as LFO wanders · automatic in-scale modulation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Scales:
* SHIFT MODE: DIATONIC
* Scale: C major

Sequencer:

LFO:

VCO:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Scales (PITCH)
- LFO (Out) >> Scales (SHIFT)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Scales (In TRIG)
- Scales (OUT A) p> VCO (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: SH-101 sequencer voice
patchIdeas.patch: CONFIG · SEQ mode · record 16-note sequence via note buttons · external clock → TRIG · OUT B plays the sequence · TRIG OUT fires on each step to envelope gate · no CV source needed — Scales is the whole sequencer
patchIdeas.diagram:
Scales:
* OUT B: SEQ · 16-step sequence recorded

Clock:

VCO:

ENV:

- Clock (Out) c> Scales (In TRIG)
- Scales (OUT B) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Scales (Out TRIG) g> ENV (Gate)
